properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Away, away from the noise Alone with You Away, away to hear your voice And meet with You Nothing else matters, my one desire is

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: To worship You, I live To worship You, I live, I live To worship You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Away, away, away, away from the noise Alone with You 'Way, away to hear your voice And meet with You, meet with You It's been a while But hear my heart cry again

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Nothing else matters Nothing else matters
